Document:
# Shadekin
Shadekin are a species of four eared, feline creatures originating from an adjacent dimension commonly referred to as “The Dark”; A place where light follows fundamentally different laws of physics and is thus quite rare, leading to Shadekin developing a sensitivity to bright lights. Shadekin are naturally curious creatures, eventually exploring our dimension as they are attracted to anomalous places and phenomena and often seek to understand such.
## Racial Features
- Their blood is quite different from that of most other species, being difficult to clot due to its unique composition, and taking longer to replenish if lost. Shadekin receive [color=#ffa500]100% more bloodloss damage and heal bloodloss damage 75% slower[/color]. - Due to their unique body composition, they are more resistant to genetic damages, [color=#1e90ff]75% less cellular damage[/color], but are weaker to radiation exposure, [color=#ffa500]30% more radiation damage[/color], and electrical shocks, [color=#ffa500]25% more shock damage[/color]. - Due to their short fur, shadekin are more resistant to cold, [color=#1e90ff]25% less cold damage[/color], but have difficulty dealing with heat, [color=#ffa500]20% more heat damage[/color]. - They lack any sort of lungs and thus do not breathe. - Shadekin eyes are more susceptible to flashes, taking twice as long to recover from them. - Their eyes have adapted to their home dimension's lack of light, granting them near perfect vision in pitch black darkness. - Their fingers have short claws at their tips, letting them deal [color=red]5[/color] slash damage with unarmed attacks.
## Nightvision Shadekin, due to their natural adaptation to their home dimension have innate Night-vision. They are capable of having perfect vision even in pitch black darkness. However, due to the materials used to make flash resistant glasses, a shadekin's night-vision may be blocked by them. Shadekin can use the HUD variant of these glasses to mantain the utility of their natural night-vision, at the cost of not having flash protection.
## LIGHT SENSITIVITY [color=yellow]Light Exposure: Dark[/color] - Passive Regeneration is no longer stopped by being above 20 damage. - Nightvision.
[color=yellow]Light Exposure: Low[/color] - No Buffs/Nerfs.
[color=yellow]Light Exposure: Annoying[/color] - Passive Regeneration is disabled.
[color=yellow]Light Exposure: High[/color] - Heavy Slowdown.
[color=yellow]Light Exposure:[/color] [color=red]EXTREME[/color] - Get burned [color=red]1[/color] heat damage per second.
## Marish and Empathy Shadekin language, commonly referred to as “marrish” consists of a combination of wurbles, hisses and a distinct sound that can be described as a “Marr”, similar to a “meow” of a cat. Additionally, tail and ear movement is of great importance during verbal communication, because of this their language is exceptionally information dense. Most if not all Shadekin possess an intrinsic understanding of each other's intent and motives, often assisting with non-verbal communication. This mechanism is commonly referred to as Shadekin Empathy as they seem to be able to feel each other's emotions to an extent.
## Age and Names
Shadekin are a very long lived species, being considered legal adults at the age of 18 and seemingly no longer aging physically after 100 years. Shadekin older than 400 years often go through extensive meditative periods, reflecting and processing lifetimes of experience in order to prevent mental degradation and are thus quite rare in realspace. Shadekin pick their own names from a concept or psychological state they find enticing. Names like "Entropy", "Veil", "Harmony", "Joy", "Malice" or "Bliss" are some examples. Some take scientific concepts they learned about or know a lot about, or use professions they enjoy. Examples include: "Chemist", "Theta", "Higgs", "Planck". Some shadekin names can be extremely broad and can consist of multiple words. Rarely there is a Shadekin with a regular name such as "John" but it is not unreasonable if the name has a meaning to the kin in question. Lastly, sometimes a Shadekin mother imparts either their name or a name of their choice onto their off-spring which often becomes part of their moniker.
## Eye color significance
Shadekin Eye colors are of great importance to them. It is comparable to a caste system many other species attempted, albeit biologically built in. The eye color of a shadekin is tied to their personality traits, and can change over long periods of time. It is important to note that shadekin eye color is not a perfect science, it only displays what the shadekin tends towards, not a hard biological limit. It is not uncommon to see shadekin in positions that dont "suit" their eye color.
- [color=#38761d]Green[/color]: Evasive, Timid yet also Friendly. Often found in positions where social talent is required as well as soft skills. Uncommon in our dimension
- [color=#0000ff]Blue[/color]: Rational, Calm, Knowledge Seeking. These are often medical doctors, spiritual guides and psychologists. Uncommon in RS.
- [color=#bf9000]Yellow[/color]: Insular, very tech savant. These Shadekin often care little for social interactions and prefer working with machines and constructs. Rare in our dimension
- [color=#ff9900]Orange[/color]: Aggressively insular. Rarely seen outside the Dark, these Shadekin are often found manning defensive structures and enforcing laws. Exceptionally rare in our dimension.
- [color=#ff0000]Red[/color]: Confrontational, direct, sometimes aggressive. These Shadekin often take on the mantle of Warriors. Common in our dimension
- [color=#ff00ff]Pink[/color]: Creative, Artists and virtuose. Shadekin that often take on the mantle of singers, musicians, artists and performance artists. Common in our dimension
- [color=#9900ff]Purple[/color]: Inquisitive, Knowledge seeking, reckless. These are often smarter than most of their kin and thus take on any scientific positions. They are great teachers and care to spread their knowledge onto others. Common in our dimension
- [color=#a1a1a1]Black[/color]: Shadekin that failed during the core activation ritual and winded up stuck in our dimension. Dark or Black eyes are not a natural eye color of shadekin, it is the primary tell of a shadekin with black eye syndrome. They are often referred to as "burnt" shadekin due to the damage their core has sustained, rendering it unusable. Other shadekin often take pity on them and try to assist them. Very common our dimension.
- [color=#f3f3f3]White[/color]: Shadekin that have exceptional control over the Dark's unique properties. These naturally are apt for leader positions and often are treated with great respect by other shadekin. Almost never found in our dimension.
